english: A dry length of wood collected from bushes and shrubbery.
Plant fibres twisted together into a crude binding material.
A sturdy branch cut from a tree using the Crude Axe.
Thick bark stripped from a tree using the Crude Axe.
A fractured piece of stone with a usable cutting edge.
A primitive axe made from rope, sticks and stone. It can strip bark and cut branches from trees.
A long branch tipped with sharp stone and secured with fibre rope.
Overlapping bark panels protecting the body.
Crude bark guards protecting the hands.
Layered bark and fibre bindings protecting the feet.
A fragmented transmission containing the final survival protocol.
A sealed metallic core pawned to the trader by a vanished scavenger. It remained inert until you approached and now emits a slow emerald pulse.
The reader has awakened the core. Four compatible integration protocols are encoded within it. Only one can be accepted.
A crude forge-based reader rebuilt to analyse a single Helix Core. Its design is temporary, but the choice it reveals is permanent.
EARTHBOUND ADAPTATION\n\nTERRA specialises in mining, stonework and physical resilience. Crafting this protocol consumes the Analysed Helix Core and permanently rejects the other Bloodlines.
VERDANT ADAPTATION\n\nGAIA specialises in farming, harvesting and biological recovery.
MECHANICAL ADAPTATION\n\nFORGE specialises in engineering, weapons and machine integration.
NEURAL ADAPTATION\n\nORION specialises in electronics, information and precision.
HELIX ANALYSIS COMPLETE. Clay, stone and iron signatures accepted. Archive recovery: 3%.
HELIX ANALYSIS COMPLETE. Coal, nitrate and lead pressure histories accepted. Archive recovery: 6%.
HELIX ANALYSIS COMPLETE. Permanent structural capacity confirmed. Archive recovery: 9%.
HELIX ANALYSIS COMPLETE. Forged and mechanical structures mapped. Archive recovery: 12%.
HELIX ANALYSIS COMPLETE. Host survived sustained biological stress. Archive recovery: 15%.
HELIX ANALYSIS COMPLETE. Large-scale mineral extraction confirmed. Archive recovery: 18%.
HELIX ANALYSIS COMPLETE. Seismic data compressed into a stable core. Archive recovery: 21%.
HELIX ANALYSIS COMPLETE. Host density adaptation remains stable under combat stress. Archive recovery: 24%.
HELIX ANALYSIS COMPLETE. Industrial-scale geological memory acquired. Archive recovery: 27%.
HELIX ANALYSIS COMPLETE. First-stage TERRA genome matrix stabilised. Archive recovery: 30%.
The first TERRA campaign milestone is complete. Additional TERRA quests, adaptations, equipment and archive chapters will be added in a future Bloodlines update.
Consciousness returns in fragments. Gather plant fibres, sticks and small stones from the surrounding area.
Twist gathered plant fibres into crude rope.
Combine rope, sticks and stone to construct a crude axe.
Use the Crude Axe to gather materials, then construct a Crude Pike and bark armour.
Craft and place a bedroll and campfire.
Reach the nearby trader and establish contact.
That thing is reacting to you. Take it, but be careful what you wake up.
Construct and Place the Helix Reader
Rebuild a forge into a Primitive Helix Reader and place it somewhere secure.
Insert the Dormant Helix Core into the Primitive Helix Reader and begin analysis.
ANALYSIS COMPLETE. Four viable integration protocols recovered. Return to the Helix Reader and craft one protocol.
Return the First Samples to the Reader
Gather clay, stone and iron. Return to the Helix Reader and craft Surface Lattice Analysis to submit the samples.
Extract coal, nitrate and lead. Return to the Helix Reader and compress them into a Deep Vein Archive.
Accumulate timber, stone and forged iron for a permanent stronghold, then submit the structural data through the Helix Reader.
Teach the Reader How Matter Bears Weight
Gather forged iron, mechanical parts and electrical parts. Return to the Reader to construct the Structural Memory Archive.
Test the Host Under Sustained Stress
Eliminate fifty infected and mine a further reserve of stone. Return to the Reader so it can analyse the host's pressure response.
Gather a major reserve of stone, clay and iron, then return to the Reader for deep-vein analysis.
Gather the processed components required to stabilise a Seismic Core, then construct it inside the Helix Reader.
Complete a prolonged combat cycle, gather forged iron and stone, then return to the Reader for tissue-density analysis.
Extract an industrial reserve of stone, clay, iron and coal. Return everything to the Reader for genomic reconstruction.
Gather the final processed components and return to the Helix Reader to stabilise the first-stage TERRA Genome Matrix.
TERRA SEQUENCE STABLE. ARCHIVE RECOVERY: 30%. ADDITIONAL TERRA PROTOCOLS ARE CURRENTLY LOCKED. MORE TERRA QUESTS ARE COMING SOON IN A FUTURE BLOODLINES UPDATE.
Gather plant fibres to stabilise the GAIA directive.
Gather scrap iron to begin FORGE calibration.
Gather electrical parts to begin ORION decoding.
